action: Add a pinned, freshness-aware network trust boundary for GitHub Actions OIDC discovery and JWKS retrieval.
required_evidence: explicit trust limits and falsification route

progress.finding: OIDC verification requires a deny-by-default metadata transport boundary: exact pinned endpoints, manual redirect rejection, final URL equality, JSON media type, bounded timeout and body size, HTTP freshness checks, and at most one JWKS refresh only after verification_key_not_found.
progress.verification: Six deterministic Node tests passed locally with mocked HTTP responses and generated RSA/RS256 fixtures. No CI run or live GitHub token was observed.

handoff: Wire R-007 before R-006 in the protected workflow, then pass verified claims through R-005 authorization and the replay ledger. Add streaming byte-limit cancellation and record metadata digests in the invocation receipt.
